title: gonostemon vetulus
intro: Gonostemon vetulus, also known as the lesser aloe or bitter aloe, is a succulent plant species native to Southern Africa, characterized by its small size and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and laxative effects. The health benefits of Gonostemon vetulus include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice for treating various ailments in folk medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
